_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The consensus leans toward a tentative upward transition into Disbelief as extreme fear and sideline dry powder mirror the August 2024 bottom setup, but structural divergences in ETF flows and funding keep conviction low.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing conflicting factors, while the narrative writer implies an upward leg; the split reflects disagreement on whether structural divergences outweigh the bottom analog.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with VIX spiking above 25 and funding turning negative, confirming true bottom formation and upward leg initiation.
next_move.invalidated_if: ETF flows sustain above 90 while BTC breaks $68K with funding rising above 0.01%, invalidating stagnation and confirming a direct Hope phase transition.
